# backend/responsible_ai/router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:14Z

## Purpose
/api/v1/responsible-ai/* — 12-lens Responsible AI structure per process.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import logging
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_probe_library(module_names)`: Probe if any of the listed modules is importable.
- `_score_lens(lens_id, process_id)`: Deterministic hash-based score per §57.7 (stable across calls).
- `_outcome(score, lib_installed)`: Outcome per score + library state.
- `_build_lens_for_process(lens, process_id)`: Materialize one lens with per-process score + outcome.
- `_summary(lens, process_id, score, outcome, lib_state)`: One-line summary report per lens.
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `list_lenses()`: Catalog of 12 lens definitions (no process binding).
- `lenses_for_process(process_id)`: All 12 lenses materialized for one process · scored · with outcome.
- `lens_for_process(process_id, lens_id)`: Single lens detail for one process.
- `lens_timeseries(process_id, lens_id, days)`: P0 #8 · 30-day time-series of lens scores for drift detection.
- `summary_report(process_id)`: Aggregate report · used by ResponsibleAIPanel summary section.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- ─── 12 lenses · canonical per operator brief ──────────────────────
- ±0.1 per-day noise + slight downward drift per day
